description.en: Attacks 2 enemies.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>.
description.jp: 敵2体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击2名敌人。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and heals the caster by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52072_1]</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color> and increases inversely proportional to the number of targets.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52072_1]</color>回復する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほど、対象が少ないほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52072_1]</color> 회복합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가하며 대상의 수가 적을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使自身生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52072_1]</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高;目标数量越少,则该技能的伤害越高。

name.jp: エンド・オブ・ワールド

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52073_1]</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52073_1] turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color> and increases inversely proportional to the number of targets.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52073_1]</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52073_1]ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\nこのスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPし、対象が少ないほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52073_1]</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52073_1]턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가하며 대상이 적을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52073_1]</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52073_1]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高;目标数量越少,则该技能的伤害越高。
